title: One quality will be most in-demand from job-seekers in the AI era, Animoca co-founder Siu says
summary_full: Yat Siu, the co-founder of Animoca Brands, says AI is going to change what skills are most valuable in the workforce.
summary_public: Yat Siu, the co-founder of Animoca Brands, says AI is going to change what skills are most valuable in the workforce.
